search_query: what is soot and its health effects
combined_text: Soot Pollution Facts Soot Pollution Facts WHAT IS SOOT? Soot is an environmental contaminant. It is the result of the incomplete combustion of hydrocarbons. You can see soot belching from the exhaust pipes of diesel trucks as well as smokestacks; it accumulates on your windowsills if you live near a major road. Soot is
